_meta.task: Identify the company that raised funding from a (title, snippet) pair from a news search result.
_meta.source: output/stages/stage1-2026-04-26.json (32 real Series A pipeline items)
_meta.labeling_notes: company=null when item is roundup/multi-company/aggregator/non-funding. is_funding=false ONLY when the article is not a funding announcement at all. company name normalized to canonical form found in text.
_meta.scoring_field_weights: company exact-match (case-insensitive, normalized whitespace) = 0.7. is_funding match = 0.3.
